{ "name": "callsites", "version": "3.1.0", "description": "Get callsites from the V8 stack trace API", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/callsites", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "sindresorhus.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=6" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "stacktrace", "v8", "callsite", "callsites", "stack", "trace", "function", "file", "line", "debug" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^1.4.1", "tsd": "^0.7.2", "xo": "^0.24.0" } }
